name: EA-AI Ontology (AI/ML Architecture)
description: Vendor-neutral AI/ML architecture ontology covering AI workloads, autonomous agents, RAG systems, ML pipelines, model registries, agent orchestration, architecture patterns, and responsible AI controls. Extracted from EA-MSFT-ONT to enable multi-cloud AI architecture modelling.

components.AIAgent: Autonomous AI agent with tool-use and reasoning capabilities
components.RAGSystem: Retrieval-Augmented Generation system with vector store
components.MLPipeline: Machine learning pipeline for model training and deployment
components.ModelRegistry: Centralised repository for versioned ML models and governance
components.AgentOrchestrator: Coordination layer for multi-agent system orchestration
components.ResponsibleAIControl: Control mechanism for ethical and responsible AI governance

crossOntology.name: hostsWorkload
crossOntology.purpose: EA-CORE -> EA-AI: Application hosts AI workloads

crossOntology.name: hasTools
crossOntology.purpose: EA-AI -> EA-CORE: AI agent tool integration with applications

crossOntology.name: alignsToSecurity
crossOntology.purpose: EA-AI -> EA-CORE: Responsible AI controls align to enterprise security

versionHistory.changes: Initial vendor-neutral AI/ML ontology. 5 entities extracted from EA-MSFT-ONT v1.0.0 (AIWorkload, AIAgent, RAGSystem, AIArchitecturePattern, ResponsibleAIControl) and re-namespaced to ea-ai:. 3 new entities added (MLPipeline, ModelRegistry, AgentOrchestrator). 8 entities, 9 relationships, 8 business rules, 6 enumerations. OAA v6.1.0 compliant.

notes: EA-AI provides vendor-neutral AI/ML architecture modelling as a capability spoke in the EA sub-series. Extends EA-CORE-ONT. Originally extracted from EA-MSFT-ONT per Decision D2 (Scenario A) in BRIEFING-EA-Sub-Series-Restructure-VE-Skill-Chain.md. Vendor-specific AI implementations (Azure AI Services, AWS Bedrock, GCP Vertex AI) reference EA-AI entities and add platform-specific properties.
